title: Bias in curricula
body: Bias in curricula refers to real or perceived bias in curricula or textbooks. Biases may include minimizing wrongdoings conducted by the subject nation, such as colonialism, slavery or genocide, bias against historical female figures or bias for or against certain religions.
categories: All articles that may be too long
